headlines.headline: Plevum Partners warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Central Europe operations

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions in a key region create immediate operational headwinds and potential revenue delays.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
